generated_oml:
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://example.org/DTDFVocab"
instance OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal crane movement trajectories using kinematic modeling"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight
]

instance CraneDynamicsSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates crane dynamics for virtual commissioning"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationValidationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares real-time sensor data with simulation outputs for validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionAlert
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs historical sensor and motor data to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time crane operation visualization via Grafana dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalVisualizationInsight
]

instance LoggingApplicationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Application for transmitting sensor data via MQTT and logging to TimescaleDB"
]

instance HardwareDesignService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Hardware design service for custom driver board development"
]

instance IterativeDevelopmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Iterative development process following publications [4], [5], [6], [7]"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemEvolutionInsight
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory planning for crane movement"
]

instance FaultDetectionAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fault detection alerts based on validation thresholds"
]

instance OperationalVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization for operational decisions"
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data insights for crane operation analysis"
]

instance SimulationValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation validation insights for virtual commissioning"
]

instance SystemEvolutionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "System evolution modeling using DarTwin notation"
]

instance DockerContainer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker containerization for deployment isolation"
    DTDFVocab:enables [OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, CraneDynamicsSimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeVisualizationService, IterativeDevelopmentService]
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB for time-series data storage and querying"
    DTDFVocab:enables [HistoricalDataLoggingService, ContinuousValidationService]
]

instance GrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana dashboard for real-time data visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance MosquittoMQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for real-time sensor data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables LoggingApplicationService
]

instance GantrylibModule : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python gantrylib module for crane control logic"
    DTDFVocab:enables LoggingApplicationService
]

instance KiCadDesign : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "KiCad for hardware design of controller boards"
    DTDFVocab:enables HardwareDesignService
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D CAD model of gantry crane created in Autodesk Fusion 360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DockerContainer
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model used for optimal trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DockerContainer
]

instance DarTwinModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DarTwin notation for modeling system evolution"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DockerContainer
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures swing angle of hoist motion for gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn GantryCraneSystem
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed for crane operation safety"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn GantryCraneSystem
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Swing angle time-series data from encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Wind speed time-series data from anemometer"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance CartMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling horizontal cart movement of gantry crane"
    base:isContainedIn GantryCraneSystem
]

instance HoistMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling vertical hoist movement of gantry crane"
    base:isContainedIn GantryCraneSystem
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for container pickup"
    base:isContainedIn GantryCraneSystem
]

instance TMC4671CartController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval Motor Controller for Cart Motor"
    base:isContainedIn GantryCraneSystem
]

instance TMC4671HoistController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval Motor Controller for Hoist Motor"
    base:isContainedIn GantryCraneSystem
]

instance ArduinoMicrocontroller : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Microcontroller managing sensor readings and electromagnet control"
    base:isContainedIn GantryCraneSystem
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Interface for physical crane sensor data collection and MQTT transmission"
    base:isContainedIn GantryCraneSystem
]

instance LoggingApplication : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Application for logging sensor data to TimescaleDB"
    base:isContainedIn GantryCraneSystem
]

instance GantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane inspired by harbor cranes in the port of Antwerp"
    base:contains [SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, CartMotor, HoistMotor, Electromagnet, TMC4671CartController, TMC4671HoistController, ArduinoMicrocontroller, PhysicalCraneInterface, LoggingApplication]
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., optimal trajectories generated by the Trajectory Generator Service) are sent via the Control Application using the Physical Crane Interface to actuate the Cart Motor, Hoist Motor, and Electromagnet."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization, with data logging and validation occurring without fixed intervals as indicated by 'continuously logs' and 'continuously compares' in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Physical crane components interfaced via Python modules, with digital services (database, dashboard, trajectory generator, simulation, validation) orchestrated through MQTT and Docker containers on a single computer."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated), supporting fault detection, continuous validation, and trajectory optimization during system operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service calculates distance metrics between real measurements and simulated trajectories; breaches of predefined thresholds trigger operator notifications via the dashboard."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto) for inter-service communication between physical and virtual components."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All digital components deployed as Docker containers on a personal computer, managed via Docker Compose."
]
